App.title: GPT Card
App.subtitle: Personal website card with booking slots
App.editingLanguage: You are editing the profile content for {language}.

Settings.publicMcpDescription: Connect this public endpoint in any MCP-compatible agent so visitors can inspect your card and request consultation slots.
Settings.publicMcpSetup: Add a custom MCP connector in your agent and use this URL as the server endpoint.
Settings.publicMcpNoAuth: No authentication is required. The public MCP only exposes booking-safe tools.
Settings.publicMcpTools: Available tools: getPublicCard, listAvailableSlots, checkSlotAvailability, createConsultationRequest.

Onboarding.teaser: Add your profile, availability, and publish a page visitors can use to request a consultation.
